search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:licensessubscriptionentitlements" $orgid$ | dedup sku | rename name as "Name", productType as "Product Type", sku as "SKU" | table "Name", "Product Type", "SKU"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:licensessubscriptionentitlements" $orgid$ | dedup sku | search name="$row.Name$" productType="$row.Product Type$" sku="$row.SKU$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
